case_title: WADE F. EXUM VS. GAIL SHIFMAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED ON FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO PLAINTIFF EXUM, WADE F.
REPLY DECLARATION OF GAIL SHIFMAN IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION FILED BY DEFENDANT SHIFMAN, GAIL

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GAIL SHIFMAN'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION, FOR STAY OF PENDING ACTION & FOR INTERIM AWARD OF REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES AND EXPENSES. ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED. THE COURT TOOK THE ISSUE OF ATTORNEY FEES UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998 --- AFTER HEARING THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: THE COURT AWARDS DEFENDANT ATTORNEY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $12,885.00, AND $410.00 IN COSTS. PARTIES NOTIFIED OF THE COURT'S RULING BY TELEPHONE ON JULY 14, 2011. MR. WHITE IS DIRECTED TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-12-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-10-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS OF ARBITRATION STAY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

Notice Of Motion And Oiton For Order Compelling Arb For Stay Of Pending Action & For Interim Award Of Reasonable Attorneys Fees And Expenses
Off Calendar Jul-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GAIL SHIFMAN'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION, FOR STAY OF PENDING ACTION & FOR INTERIM AWARD OF REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES AND EXPENSES.
Appearances: Robert E. White of the Law Offices of Robert E. White (788.6151) for defendant and moving party; Barry K. Tagawa of the Law Office of Barry K. Tagawa (951.8600) for plaintiff and responding party.
Argued and the court ruled as follows: defendant's motion for an order compelling arbitration is granted. Motion to stay proceedings is granted. The court took the issue of attorney fees under submission. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
-------------------------------------------------------------
After hearing the court ruled as follows: the court awards defendant attorney fees in the amount of $12,885.00, and $410.00 in costs. Parties notified of the court's ruling by telephone on July 14, 2011. Mr. White is directed to submit a proposed form of order.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Continued To Aug-05-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
